_fixture_purpose: Demonstrates a hypothesis at the lowest verification level — a pattern match with no specific evidence against the operator's stack. Often the first 30 seconds of a diagnosis. Live fix is blocked. Used as the entry-state for hypothesis-status transitions.
hypothesis: Click decline despite stable rankings could be explained by AI Overviews appearing on more SERPs and absorbing clicks that would otherwise reach the organic top results.
observed_effect: 28-day GSC clicks down 23% versus prior 28-day window. Impressions down only 9%, average position roughly flat. CTR dropped from 1.24% to 1.05%.

supporting_evidence.observation: Observed pattern (stable position + stable impressions + falling CTR) is consistent with AI Overviews zero-click absorption as documented across the SEO industry in 2025-2026.

_framework_note: Pattern match alone never produces verified status. To move from suspected to likely, a per-URL or per-query analysis of SERP feature presence (via DataForSEO live SERP, Sistrix SERP-feature snapshot, or manual SERP inspection) would need to confirm that AI Overviews are present on the affected queries. To move from likely to verified, GSC URL Inspection or a controlled test (running the query in incognito with location-matched IP) would need to show the AI Overview live and absorbing the click position. In the originating recovery case, this hypothesis was opened on 2026-05-28 at 08:40, downgraded by 11:00 when a stronger competing hypothesis (canonical doubling on a single page accounting for 71% of click loss) emerged from direct page-level GSC analysis. AI Overviews remained as a secondary partial-cause hypothesis to revisit in monitoring phase 4.
